result.stdout:
Description:
  BM Consulting GmbH Open API Command-Line Interface

Usage:
  bmcoapi <CONFIG> <COMMON> [options]

Arguments:
  <CONFIG>  The configuration file to use.
  <COMMON>  The directory to output the common class library to.

Options:
  --debug         Enable debug logging.
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
